dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Upload recipes, plan meals, and shop across stores.
dashboard.importRecipeDesc: Paste link (blog, Instagram, TikTok), text, or upload photo/PDF. AI structures the recipe.
dashboard.cookbooksDesc: Upload PDF cookbooks; detect and import multiple recipes at once.
dashboard.libraryDesc: Your saved recipes, tagged and categorized.
dashboard.readyRecipesDesc: Built-in recipes to add to your plan or list.
dashboard.plannerDesc: Plan breakfast, lunch, dinner for the week.
dashboard.shoppingDesc: Merged ingredients, ready to send to a store.
dashboard.storesDesc: Connect Shufersal, Tiv Taam, etc.; agent fills cart.

library.title: Recipe Library
library.subtitle: Save and manage your recipes.
library.noRecipes: No recipes yet. Upload a recipe to get started.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Merged ingredients. Choose a store to have the agent add items to cart.
shopping.noLists: No shopping lists. Create one from a recipe or meal plan.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.subtitle: Ingredients you already have at home. Shopping lists are automatically reduced using pantry.
pantry.noItems: Your pantry is empty. Add items manually or from a shopping list.

stores.title: Store Connections
stores.subtitle: Connect grocery stores. Log in once; we store your session securely.
